name: John Doe
history: Recently completed an undergraduate degree and is entering the workforce. Came out to parents within the last two and a half years and received negative reactions. Became more distant from parents afterward. Moved to New York for education and explored identity away from family influence. Strained relationship with mother, described as focused on practical concerns rather than emotional support. Tension with sister described as envious of the patient's independence and achievements.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I need to be self-sufficient because I can't rely on others.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not smart enough to achieve my goals.
coping_strategies: Avoids social interactions and focuses on reading and collecting comics.
situation: Recalling the experience of coming out to parents and the negative aftermath. Preparing for or having interactions with family while maintaining distance.
auto_thought: I am going to be alone forever.
behavior: Avoids social interactions, smokes cigarettes, and reads extensively.
